title: Simple Iron Doors Open
description: This simple mod allows you to open iron doors and trapdoors by right-clicking on them.
body:
# Description

This simple mod allows you to open iron doors and trapdoors by right-clicking on them.

# Mod review by pravculear (Old mod version without hand animation)

[![REVIEW](https://img.youtube.com/vi/e5o3pqBrKgo/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e5o3pqBrKgo)
